'''Ludwin Katarkus''' was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] leading up to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. They were sent on a [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomatic]] [[Mission to Virgillia 7|mission]] to mediate the [[Virgillian Civil War]] with their [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Danyawarra]], and two other [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. The Jedi Master [[Death/Legends|died]] during the mission, but their Padawan survived, going on to serve in the Clone Wars. Three [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] after the Jedi Master's disappearance, Katarkus's death was announced in the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]], and the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] announced it would hold a [[Jedi funeral/Legends|funeral]] for them.

==Biography==
Ludwin Katarkus was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] who took an individual called [[Danyawarra]] as their [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] sometime before the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="HNN45" /> In [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]],<ref name="HNN date 23">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|45|jediwatch/13228_1.html|Virgillian Jedi Envoy Declared Lost}} is set on the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] "13:2:28," which corresponds to [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]] per the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] assigned Katarkus as a [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomatic]] [[Envoy/Legends|envoy]] on a [[Mission to Virgillia 7|mission]] to negotiate an end to the ongoing [[Virgillian Civil War]] between the [[Virgillian Free Alignment/Legends|Virgillian Free Alignment]] and the [[Aristocracy]], which had begun two [[Standard year/Legends|years]] earlier in the [[Virgillia system/Legends|Virgillia system]]. Consisting of two Master-Padawan teams, the envoy was comprised of Katarkus and Danyawarra, as well as Master [[Everen Ettene]] and [[Halagad Ventor]].<ref name="HNN45" />

In the last [[Standard month/Legends|month]] of 23 BBY, as the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] carrying the Jedi envoy arrived<ref name="HNN45" /> on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Bakura Sourcebook">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''</ref> [[Virgillia 7]],<ref name="Skyewalkers" /> it was destroyed. After the diplomatic team was missing for three [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]], they were all presumed [[Death/Legends|dead]], according to the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] published on 13:2:28 [[Great ReSynchronization|GrS]]. The same article announced that [[Jedi funeral/Legends|memorial services]] for them would be held by the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on<ref name="HNN45" /> the planet<ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] the next [[Standard day/Legends|day]].<ref name="HNN45" /> Katarkus had indeed died on the mission,<ref name="CSWE Danyawarra">{{CSWECite|I|165|Danyawarra}}</ref> as did Ettene,<ref name="Skyewalkers" /> but both Danywarra<ref name="Insider">{{InsiderCite|84|Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic}}</ref> and Ventor<ref name="Skyewalkers" /> actually survived the attack and reunited with the Order, serving as a [[Jedi Commander/Legends|commander]]<ref name="Insider" /> and a [[Jedi General/Legends|general]], respectively, in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the Clone Wars.<ref name="Domain of Evil">''[[Domain of Evil]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Ludwin Katarkus was first mentioned in the article "Virgillian Jedi Envoy Declared Lost" in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 45|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #45'']], an [[in-universe]] issue of the HoloNet News<ref name="HNN45" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]<ref name="Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]] before [[March 10]], [[2002]].<ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=threads/5990764|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-10|time=7:24 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20201002154704/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764}}</ref>
